# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Continuous Deployment
on: [push]
    branches:
      - main
jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2
    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: 14.x
    - name: Install Dependencies
      run: npm install
    - name: Build
      run: npm run build
    - name: Test
      run: npm test
    - name: Deploy to Production
      uses: akhileshmurthy/ssh-action@v1
      with:
        ssh_private_key: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
        host: your-production-server-ip
        username: your-production-username
        port: 22
        script: |
          cd /path/to/your/app
          git checkout main
          git merge --no-ff origin/main
          npm install
          npm run build
          npm run deploy
